hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; fi
if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'; fi

hooks.prompt: Check if the last task involved code changes. If so, verify: 1) Were tests mentioned or run? 2) Were there any obvious issues left unaddressed? If tests should have been run but weren't, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Please run the relevant tests to verify these changes work correctly."}. Otherwise respond with {"ok": true}.
